strategy: Hit with Myth — he takes +20% from it, and his Storm resist is 40%.
The Gold Dragon opens with a self Shadow Sentinel: 75% intercept, 100 critical block, and -30% incoming damage. Most damage aimed at the Sultan gets redirected into the Dragon at a discount.
Kill the Gold Dragon first, or simply AoE — the intercepted damage still wears the Dragon down, and an AoE hits Sultan, Dragon, and Steeleton at once.
Once the Dragon is down, blade and finish the Sultan. At 3,760 health, one boosted Myth hit ends it.
cheatNotes: Round 1 the Gold Dragon shields the group: it intercepts 75% of damage aimed at the Sultan and takes it at -30%. Either burn the Dragon down first or use AoEs so the redirect does not matter.
